ddls:
CREATE TABLE "baby_names" (
  "name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each baby name entry */,
  "name" TEXT /* The baby name */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender associated with the name */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year the name data pertains to */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code where the name popularity was recorded */,
  "popularity_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the name's popularity for the given year and state */,
  "name_meaning" TEXT /* Meaning of the baby name */,
  "name_origin" TEXT /* Origin of the baby name */,
  "cultural_significance" TEXT /* Cultural significance of the baby name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_baby_names_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_baby_names_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_baby_names_gender FOREIGN KEY ("gender") REFERENCES genders ("gender_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_code" TEXT /* Unique state code */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_code" TEXT /* Code representing the gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "gender_description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year */,
  "decade" INTEGER /* Decade to which the year belongs (e.g., 2020 belongs to 2020s) */,
  "century" INTEGER /* Century to which the year belongs (e.g., 2020 belongs to 21st century) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "popularity_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each popularity trend entry */,
  "name_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the baby name */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* A calculated score representing the name's popularity */,
  "relative_popularity" REAL /* Relative popularity of the name compared to other names in the same year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_popularity_trends_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_popularity_trends_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("name_id") REFERENCES baby_names ("name_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, public user) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "name_id" INTEGER /* ID of the baby name data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Geographic location from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("name_id") REFERENCES baby_names ("name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "name_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each name variant */,
  "name_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the main baby name entry */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Alternative spelling or variant of the baby name */,
  "variant_type" TEXT /* Type of variant (e.g., nickname, alternate spelling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_variants_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("name_id") REFERENCES baby_names ("name_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "name_id" INTEGER /* ID of the baby name being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "feedback_comment" TEXT /* Optional comment provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("name_id") REFERENCES baby_names ("name_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advanced_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "name_id" INTEGER /* ID of the baby name being analyzed */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year for which analytics are being generated */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score indicating public perception of the name */,
  "trend_prediction" TEXT /* Prediction of the name's trend (e.g., rising, falling, stable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advanced_analytics_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("name_id") REFERENCES baby_names ("name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advanced_analytics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "name_clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "name_id" INTEGER /* ID of the baby name in the cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster (e.g., 'Vintage Names', 'Nature-Inspired Names') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_clusters_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("name_id") REFERENCES baby_names ("name_id")
)
